chunks.text:
H. No. 6232 / 53 OG No. 17, 5512 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1753, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND TITLE B OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED ELEVEN,âHIGHWAYS, FEEDER AND SECONDARY ROADSâMARINDUQUE, PROJECT B-028.17.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Project B-028.17, title B of Republic Act Numbered One thousand four hundred eleven, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"Project B-028.17âMogpog-Hightown-Danao Road Improvement ..................... P20.000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
